$comment: Allowlist for scripts/check-terminology-i18n.mjs. Read-only checker; this file only suppresses known-legitimate findings so a false positive never hard-blocks a valid PR. ignoreValues: exact VALUE strings never flagged by CHECK 1. ignoreKeys: leaf key paths (dotted for resources/i18n, '^'-joined for backend.ai-ui, e.g. 'comp:Foo^Bar') never flagged by CHECK 1. ignoreSegments: final key segments excluded from CHECK 2 near-duplicate reporting. ignoreNouns: capitalized phrases / PascalCase tokens that CHECK 3 must never surface as candidate new terms — matched case-insensitively as the whole phrase or a contained multiword sub-phrase. This holds three classes (see FR-3302 for the per-term classification of the current entries): (a) proper nouns / product names / third-party tools (e.g. Backend.AI, GitHub, Prometheus); (b) detector NOISE — clipped fragments (e.g. 'About Backend', 'Numeric User'), sing/plural dupes ('Selected Image' / 'Selected Images'), and generic UI microcopy ('App Name', 'Log Messages', 'My Account'); (c) BORDERLINE feature terms deferred rather than registered ('Health Status', 'Traffic Status', 'Idleness Check', 'Preopen Ports'), promotable to real terminology.json concepts later. Prefer registering a real term in terminology.json, or fixing the string, over adding entries here.
